# Accessor: defaultVerticalLayout

## Get Signature

```ts
get defaultVerticalLayout(): FigVerticalLayout;
```

Default vertical layout implied by the FIGfont header metadata.

### Returns

[`FigVerticalLayout`](../../../type-aliases/FigVerticalLayout.md)
